_purpose: AUTHORITATIVE record/engine metadata assumptions for the 37 core.ALL symbols; the ground truth the live-vs-record judge reconciles broker SymbolInfo against. Every field sourced.
_universe: 37 core.ALL (FeedAssembler.mqh:96-104 FA_SYMS): 31 b-book + AUDUSD/NZDUSD a-core legs (33 traded/swapped) + EURJPY (eurq cross + H1) + GBPUSD/XRPUSD/XPTUSD (H1-signal-only)

_field_provenance.lot_max: NONE in the model (settings.py has no max_lot/volume_max) — unbounded; a live-only exec concern
_field_provenance.profit/margin ccy: settings.py quote (profit) + EUR deposit; BookConvert.mqh FED_Eurq

_negative_control: PASS — injected XAUUSD contract 100->10000 (x100 SCALE drift) into the a engine; cross_checks() flagged it as CONTRACT/CROSS-ENGINE DRIFT (required)

symbols.lot_src: SatEquityNative.mqh:80-97; lot_max=None (settings.py has NO max_lot/volume_max key; model imposes no volume ceiling — only lot_step/min_lot + margin_cap 0.9)
symbols.swap_mode_expected: IGNORED — broker SYMBOL_SWAP_MODE is NOT read. Swap is fully synthesized from embedded policy-rate tables (SwapEurq.mqh / engine.costs): b_h = pct/100/365*mult at server-midnight rollover; a_h = pct/100 * flag(mult)/365 at 17:00 America/New_York rollover. Reconstruction assumes the live broker swap is bypassed entirely.
symbols.swap_src: SwapEurq.mqh SE_SYM/SE_RATE tables (CSwapEurqBH b_h + CSwapEurqCore a_h)
symbols.eurq_law: eurq = 1.0 if profit_ccy==EUR else 1/mid_close(EUR-cross); SYMBOL_CURRENCY_PROFIT==quote; deposit ccy EUR (BookConvert.mqh FED_Eurq; BH_ENGINE_SPEC.md:§3; CORESIM_SPEC.md:§4)
